customManagers.description: Read the container image pins out of the Ansible vars file (they live in a Jinja template chain, so the built-in docker manager can't see them).

packageRules.description: SAFE TIER — Postgres/Caddy minor+patch auto-merge, grouped into one weekly PR. No migrations at this level.
SAFE TIER — Ansible Galaxy collections minor+patch auto-merge.
PING TIER — Ansible collection MAJOR bumps can change module behavior the playbook relies on. Assign to you, never auto-merge.
PING TIER — Postgres/Caddy MAJOR (Postgres needs pg_upgrade; Caddy v3 is a breaking rewrite). Assign to you, never auto-merge.
PING TIER — Synapse runs DB-schema migrations on boot (often one-way). Assign to you, never auto-merge; back up and read release notes first.
PING TIER — mautrix-discord on a semver release tag; bridge updates can carry DB/config migrations. Assign to you, never auto-merge.
SAFE TIER — synapse-admin is a Tailscale-only static admin frontend (no server-side migrations). Digest-pin its rolling :latest and auto-merge weekly.
